_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Red Sox at Rays tonight: Connelly Early starts, Sox 10.5 games back
items.snark: Sox are 10.5 games out but somehow still shopping Connor Wong like he's a first round pick.

items.headline: Red Sox rank dead last in MLB with 48 home runs through 63 games
items.snark: 48 dingers in 63 games, John Henry saving balls for his yacht collection.

items.headline: Red Sox drop series finale to Yankees 6-1, Saturday rainout moved to Aug 29
items.snark: Lost Sunday, rainout saved us Saturday, even Mother Nature feels bad for us.

items.headline: Patriots mandatory minicamp begins June 9, Christian Gonzalez holdout watch continues
items.snark: Gonzalez wants his bag, Kraft wants to count his, standoff continues.

items.headline: Kayshon Boutte to participate in Patriots minicamp amid trade speculation
items.snark: Boutte showing up to minicamp like a guy at his own going away party.

items.headline: Josh McDaniels: Drake Maye knows a hell of a lot more than last year at this time
items.snark: McDaniels praising Maye like a proud dad, meanwhile offensive line still leaky.

items.headline: Will Campbell: I'm 22 years old, I'm a long way from where I'm going to be
items.snark: Campbell honest about Super Bowl beatdown, at least somebody watched the tape.

items.headline: Marcellas Dial encourages after ACL rehab: My knee doesn't hurt, no pain at all
items.snark: Dial's knee feels great, CB depth chart still feels sketchy as hell.

items.headline: Patriots could inquire about another blockbuster trade before 2026 deadline
items.snark: Brown wasn't enough, Vrabel wants the whole damn buffet apparently.
